summary: The user is working on getting back on track with their daily routine, including waking up at 7 AM and attending yoga classes. They shared details about their busy week, including a late meeting with their project manager and a long run on Saturday, while seeking advice on managing workload and staying connected with family and friends.
facts: The user has been waking up at 7 AM every day, including weekends, but slept in until 10 AM last Sunday. The user missed their morning yoga class last Monday after waking up late. The user had a meeting with their project manager on Tuesday at 2 PM, which went well. The user submitted a report by the end of the day last Wednesday and worked extra hours, getting home late around 8 PM. The user went for a long run on Saturday morning and felt great afterward. The user met up with their family for dinner on Saturday evening to celebrate their nephew's birthday.
